improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches today.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, the Claude-powered assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant AI answers, voice chat, and an unlimited members workspace.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://gdn.ai/og-image.png">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://gdn.ai/">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly stating what Gideon offers and the free trial opportunity. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when shared on LinkedIn, Facebook, and other platforms—critical for B2B audiences. Including the three free searches creates a low-friction entry point that encourages clicks.

improvements.suggestion:
Hero Headline: "Meet Gideon — Your AI-Powered Trade & Business Assistant"

Subheading: "Get instant answers, voice chat support, and a dedicated workspace for your business. Try three free searches — no card required."
improvements.rationale: The headline immediately introduces Gideon by name and clarifies its purpose (AI assistant for trade and business), building brand recognition. The subheading highlights three core value props (instant answers, voice chat, workspace) and removes friction by emphasizing the free trial with no payment commitment. This combination addresses visitor intent quickly and drives trial engagement.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a Gideon member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day (billed monthly), giving you unlimited access to your personal AI trade and business assistant, voice chat capabilities, and a dedicated members workspace. Choose annual billing to save 30 percent.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point in the conversion funnel—the transition from free trial to paid membership. By clearly explaining what happens next and immediately reinforcing the low entry price and value received, it reduces uncertainty and positions the paywall as an upgrade rather than a barrier.
